title: rhododendron lanigerum var. silvaticum
intro: Rhododendron lanigerum var. silvaticum, also known as the hairy rhododendron, is a plant species within the rhododendron family that is native to the Himalayas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which are used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Rhododendron lanigerum var. silvaticum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, which is also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
